scripts.dev:client:3000: cross-env PORT=3000 pnpm -C d_i_client run dev
scripts.dev:admin:3001: cross-env PORT=3001 pnpm -C d_i_admin run dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n client,admin -c cyan,magenta "node ./scripts/run-service.mjs --pkgDir d_i_client --port 3000 --script dev" "node ./scripts/run-service.mjs --pkgDir d_i_admin --port 3001 --script dev"
scripts.build:all: concurrently -n client,admin -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -C d_i_client build" "pnpm -C d_i_admin build"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n client,admin -c cyan,magenta "node ./scripts/run-service.mjs --pkgDir d_i_client --port 3000 --script start" "node ./scripts/run-service.mjs --pkgDir d_i_admin --port 3001 --script start"
scripts.lint: pnpm -C d_i_client lint && pnpm -C d_i_admin lint || exit 0
